subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants of God! I render thanks before the Threshold of God that He hath guided you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق حق من به درگاه احدیت شکرانه نمایم که شما را هدایت فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
